page_metadata.biotools__summary: FastTargetPred is a program enabling the fast prediction of putative protein targets for input chemical databases. It allows to predict putative protein target(s) for a query compound or for a collection of compounds.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FastTargetPred is a program enabling the fast prediction of putative protein targets for input chemical databases. It allows to predict putative protein target(s) for a query compound or for a collection of compounds.
